overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 122 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 122 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.summary_zh: 重点：Hugging Face、Cerebras出现新动态，主题为“Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI”，与 AI 产品、产业落地或技术路线变化有关。
items.summary_en: Focus: Hugging Face, Cerebras has a new AI-related update around 'Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

items.title: NVIDIA and Partners Build in America, for America
items.summary_zh: 重点：NVIDIA and its partners are investing in American manufacturing, supply chains, energy grids and skilled workforces so the U.S. can produce the infrastructure needed for better healthcare, breakthrough scientific discovery, stronger industrial productivity
items.summary_en: Focus: NVIDIA and its partners are investing in American manufacturing, supply chains, energy grids and skilled workforces so the U.S. can produce the infrastructure needed for better healthcare, breakthrough scientific discovery, stronger industrial productivity and global technology leadership.

items.title: The Winning Essays for the Big Questions About AI
items.summary_zh: 重点：Abolishing pandemics/ Getting out of the way of AI automation/ Learning from Honk Kong MTR's business model
items.summary_en: Focus: Abolishing pandemics/ Getting out of the way of AI automation/ Learning from Honk Kong MTR's business model

items.title: How Cursor deploys AI inside the enterprise
items.summary_zh: 重点：Cursor's Pauline Brunet explains how her team of Forward Deployed Engineers help organizations implement agents — essentially setting up software factories.
items.summary_en: Focus: Cursor's Pauline Brunet explains how her team of Forward Deployed Engineers help organizations implement agents — essentially setting up software factories.

items.title: 🔬 The Coolest Diffusion Research Isn't in LLMs — Evan Feinberg & Sergey Edunov, Genesis Molecular AI
items.summary_zh: 重点：Why the Llama lead left Meta for drug discovery, PEARL's zero-shot OpenBind win, and what becomes possible when co-folding finally crosses the accuracy threshold.
items.summary_en: Focus: Why the Llama lead left Meta for drug discovery, PEARL's zero-shot OpenBind win, and what becomes possible when co-folding finally crosses the accuracy threshold.

items.title: Warp CEO Zach Lloyd on why software factories are the next phase of coding
items.summary_zh: 重点：Warp's founder thinks every major software project will soon run on an automated factory. He discusses why and how engineers should prepare for this shift.
items.summary_en: Focus: Warp's founder thinks every major software project will soon run on an automated factory. He discusses why and how engineers should prepare for this shift.

items.title: AIEWF Daily Dispatch: Loops, Software Factories & Forward Deployed Engineers
items.summary_zh: 重点：On Tuesday at the AI Engineer World's Fair, there was a lot of talk about loops, agent engineering, and the emergence of software factories. Also a hot topic: open models.
items.summary_en: Focus: On Tuesday at the AI Engineer World's Fair, there was a lot of talk about loops, agent engineering, and the emergence of software factories. Also a hot topic: open models.

items.title: Forward Deployed Engineers and the future of software engineering
items.summary_zh: 重点：Sierra's Natalie Meurer on why product engineers and forward deployed engineers are starting to converge.
items.summary_en: Focus: Sierra's Natalie Meurer on why product engineers and forward deployed engineers are starting to converge.

items.title: Ahmad Osman on why local AI is catching up
items.summary_zh: 重点：After two packed AIEWF workshops, Ahmad Osman makes the case that local AI is catching up fast — from laptops and phones to enterprise-grade infrastructure.
items.summary_en: Focus: After two packed AIEWF workshops, Ahmad Osman makes the case that local AI is catching up fast — from laptops and phones to enterprise-grade infrastructure.
